subcodes.first_line: This servant was not among the learned, nor did He journey to distant lands. According to outward appearances, He was born in the house of one of the nobles of the state and was related unto him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این عبد از اهل علم نبوده و بلاد بعید نرفته و بحسب ظاهر در بیت یکی از رجال دولت متولد شد و باو منسوب
subcodes.subjects: @Baha'u'llah, @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
